prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins on a black screen with the DIRECTV logo centered. Beneath it are the texts “directv.com” and “1.800.DIRECTV,” with very small legal/disclaimer text along the bottom.

It then cuts to a bright, modern kitchen. A shiny chrome faucet and sink dominate the foreground. Over the faucet appears the orange-and-white “KAYAK” logo. The background includes a countertop, plants, and a coffee machine, giving the setting a clean domestic atmosphere.

Next, there is a close-up inside the metal sink basin, focused on the drain. The sink surface shows small water droplets, but no running water or hands are visible in this sampled frame.

The view widens to the kitchen. A person, apparently a repair worker or plumber, is lying on their back on a yellow mat under the sink cabinet, with legs extended outward. Tools are scattered nearby on the white floor, and a yellow toolbox is open or visible under the counter. The space remains bright, with large windows and plants in the background.

The scene then switches to a graphic interface on an orange background. It shows hotel search-result style cards with photos, hotel names, star ratings, prices, ratings, and orange “View Deal” buttons. Readable entries include “Wyndham Bonnet Creek” priced at “$164,” “Pools Point Hotel” priced at “$167,” and “Wyndham Cypress Palms” priced at “$82.” A rating bar labeled “Location” is visible on one listing.

The commercial returns to the kitchen. A hand holds a smartphone in the foreground, displaying a hotel listing screen for “Pools Point Hotel” with a photo, star rating, circular rating icons, and an orange call-to-action button. In the background, the same person remains on the floor near the open sink cabinet, with tools and the yellow toolbox still visible.

The final frame shows an outdoor pool area at a hotel or resort. A person wearing sunglasses is floating on a yellow pool float in a large swimming pool. In the foreground, a table holds a tall drink with a straw. The background shows a light-colored building with arches, lounge chairs, trees, and sunny weather, visually contrasting with the earlier kitchen repair setting.
